content:
没问题，我来为你出一道Java面试题。
[tool_call: reset_equipped_tools({"to_activate":["knowledge_retrieval","utility","interview","resume_analysis"]})]

[tool_result: reset_equipped_tools] The currently activated tool group(s): knowledge_retrieval, utility, interview, resume_analysis.
<tool-instructions>
<group name="knowledge_retrieval">知识检索工具组 — 搜索面试题库、优秀答案、公司面经、学习资源</group>
<group name="utility">通用工具组 — 进度追踪、薪资查询</group>
<group name="interview">面试工具组 — 模拟面试、回答分析、录音转写</group>
<group name="resume_analysis">简历分析工具组 — 简历解析和简历评估</group>
</tool-instructions>
[tool_result: search_questions] Error: Unauthorized tool call: 'search_questions' is not available

[tool_call: agent_spawn({"task":"帮我搜索一些高质量的Java面试题，找1-2道有代表性的中等难度的题目（比如Java集合框架、多线程、JVM、Spring等核心知识点），返回题目和简单的出题背景说明。只要题目，不需要答案。","label":"java_question_searcher","agent_id":"knowledge_searcher","timeout_seconds":30})]
